Properties.Description: get news & execute all prompts
start the analysis over stocks insights

get news & execute all prompts
start the analysis over stocks insights
temporary testing lambda for stock analysis logic
Fetches news data for a given country and date range
Term, category and sector analysis
Generate the stocks from insights.
Fetch the URLs from the raw data.
Cron job to update stock data
Cron job to update stock data for bearish sniper

D:\\TMZ\\PreMarketStockPrediction\\PreSt.serviceRawFile:
service: SP-Node-Lambda-Functions
provider:
  name: aws
  region: ap-south-1
  runtime: nodejs20.x
  timeout: 30
  environment:
    #APIS
    JWT_SECRET: "iamworkinginheliosassoftwareengineer"
    CountryTable: Country
    TokenHistoryTable: TokenHistory
    CategoryTable: StockCategory
    StockTermTable: StockTerms
    UserCFTable: UserCF
    NewsTable: NewsRawData
    FilteredNews: FilteredNews
    SectorDetailsTable: SectorDetails
    UrlExtractionTable: UrlExtraction
    DeepStockAnalysis: DeepStocksAnalysis
    SelectedStocksTable: SelectedStocks
    PlacedStocksTable: PlacedStocks
    #ANGLE_ONE_CONFIGURATIONS
    Smart_API_KEY : "uVNH5DtC"
    Smart_API_JWT_TOKEN: "eyJhbGciOiJIUzUxMiJ9..r1gMSMsr3tVJFLmw5-M8lF0BC66xMQerdv-U3D4tKgZrTNkBrhcySQmR1luroeL3iCgzQ8KmYXWnTZn7h0BWZA"
    Smart_API_SECRET: "625a12f7-a8de-4c19-9382-abfcb8be0bdf"
    Smart_API_PublicIP: "45.114.212.194"
    Smart_API_LocalIP: "127.0.0.1"
    Capital: 10000,
    Risk_Per_Trade: 0.2,
    #Lambdas

  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:Scan
            - dynamodb:GetItem
            - dynamodb:Query
            - dynamodb:PutItem
            - dynamodb:UpdateItem
          Resource:
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:ap-south-1:332717545786:table/*
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - lambda:InvokeFunction
          Resource: "*"
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - aws-marketplace:ViewSubscriptions
            - aws-marketplace:Subscribe
          Resource: "*"
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - bedrock:InvokeModel
          Resource: "*"
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - logs:CreateLogGroup
            - logs:CreateLogStream
            - logs:PutLogEvents
          Resource: "*"

plugins:
  - serverless-offline

functions:
  getCountries:
    handler: handlers/country.get
    events:
      - http:
          path: countries
          method: get

  postToken:
    handler: Common/auth.tokengeneration
    events:
      - http:
          path: tokengeneration
          method: put

  getStockTerms:
    handler: handlers/stockTerm.get
    events:
      - http:
          path: stockterms
          method: get

  getStockCategory:
    handler: handlers/stockCategory.get
    events:
      - http:
          path: stockcategory
          method: get

  userFlow:
    handler: handlers/userFlow.get
    events:
      - http:
          path: userflow
          method: put
 
  getCountry:
    handler: handlers/country.getCountry
    events:
      - http:
          path: country
          method: get

  showTermAnalysis:
    handler: handlers/getAnalysis.showTermAnalysis
    events:
      - http:
          path: showtermanalysis
          method: get

  showCategoryAnalysis:
    handler: handlers/getAnalysis.showCategoryAnalysis
    events:
      - http:
          path: showcategoryanalysis
          method: get

  showSectorAnalysis:
    handler: handlers/getAnalysis.showSectorAnalysis
    events:
      - http:
          path: showsectoranalysis
          method: get

  showStockAnalysis:
    handler: handlers/getAnalysis.showStockAnalysis
    events:
      - http:
          path: showstockanalysis
          method: get
  
  showNiftyAnalysis:
    handler: handlers/getAnalysis.showNiftyAnalysis
    events:
      - http:
          path: showniftyanlysis
          method: get

############# Externl Calls ##############

  callMain:
    handler: External/main.main
    timeout: 600
    description: "get news & execute all prompts"
    events:
      - http:
          path: executeMarketAnalysis
          method: get

  executeDeepStockAnalysis:
    handler: External/stocksDeepAnalysis.get
    timeout: 600
    description: "start the analysis over stocks insights"
    events:
      - http:
          path: deepStockAnalysis
          method: get

  tempTesting:
    handler: External/stocksAnalysis.getStockAnalysis
    timeout: 600
    description: "temporary testing lambda for stock analysis logic"
    events:
      - http:
          path: tempTesting
          method: post

############# Externl Calls ##############
  getNews:
    handler: External/newsAnalysis.get
    timeout: 600
    description: "Fetches news data for a given country and date range"    

  getmarketAnalysis:
    handler: External/marketAnalysis.getAnalysis
    timeout: 300
    description: "Term, category and sector analysis"

  getstocksAnalysis:
    handler: External/stocksAnalysis.getStockAnalysis
    timeout: 300
    description: "Generate the stocks from insights."

  geturlExtraction:
    handler: External/urlExtraction.urlExtraction
    timeout: 300
    description: "Fetch the URLs from the raw data."
      
############## Cron Jobs ##############
  cronJob:
    handler: External/cron.cron
    timeout: 300
    description: "Cron job to update stock data"

  BcronJob:
    handler: External/Bcron.Bcron
    timeout: 300
    description: "Cron job to update stock data for bearish sniper"
